title: Chrome extension to enable saving of websites to a Monday table or location
excerpt: I’m currently using Airtable for a number of functions after having tried Notion.  However, it lacks some features I require.  BUT I save a lot of websites to a table in Airtable via their Chrome extension and can’t seem…

posts.author: sallyanne (Sally-Anne Baxter)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m currently using Airtable for a number of functions after having tried Notion. However, it lacks some features I require. BUT I save a lot of websites to a table in Airtable via their Chrome extension and can’t seem to find the same feature available in Monday.com.

It’s a deal breaker for me if I can’t do that.

posts.author: rkaplan (Richard Kaplan)
posts.cookedHtml: You could achieve that fairly easily with Zapier and probably could do it with Integromat/Make as well.

posts.author: sallyanne (Sally-Anne Baxter)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you and yes, Zapier would be a solution. At the moment, I’ve embedded the particular Airtable table into Monday as an iframe so it just means I have to keep Airtable as well as Monday.
